test-case.name: AutoAdvance_DisabledMidScene_StopsBeforeNextScene

DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene

DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene

DialogueSystem: ✓ Successfully loaded next scene: Next Scene

DialogueSystem: ✗ Failed to load target scene (returned null)

test-case.name: NextScene_WithMultipleDialogueLines_TransitionsAfterAll
